# Test building mcpspy binary

# Change to mcpspy directory
cd /Volumes/tmc/go/src/github.com/tmc/mcp/cmd/mcpspy

# Build mcpspy
exec go build
exists mcpspy

# Test help flag
exec ./mcpspy -h
stderr 'Usage'
stderr 'output recording file'
stderr 'verbose mode'
stderr 'quiet mode'

# Test with invalid flag
! exec ./mcpspy --unknown-flag
stderr 'unknown flag'
